habitat_garden.name: Habitat Garden
habitat_garden.description: Complete habitat structure: ground, shrub, subcanopy, and canopy layers present

water_sensitive.name: Water Sensitive
water_sensitive.description: Comprehensive water management with swales, permeable surfaces, and water reuse

high_function_garden.name: High Function Garden
high_function_garden.description: Ecological function score of 70 or above

urban_biodiversity_node.name: Urban Biodiversity Node
urban_biodiversity_node.description: 40+ species with diverse growth forms and flowering succession

registered_ecological_garden.name: Registered Ecological Garden
registered_ecological_garden.description: Full registry compliance with annual updates and field reports

pollinator_supporter.name: Pollinator Supporter
pollinator_supporter.description: Dedicated pollinator resources with indigenous flowering succession

regenerative_practices.name: Regenerative Practices
regenerative_practices.description: Soil building and ecosystem regeneration methods actively implemented

verified_garden.name: Verified Garden
verified_garden.description: Independently assessed and verified by Gardener & Son

registry_member.name: Registry Member
registry_member.description: Active participant in the Ecological Registry network

long_term_steward.name: Long Term Steward
long_term_steward.description: Multiple assessments over time demonstrating ongoing stewardship

documentation_complete.name: Documentation Complete
documentation_complete.description: Comprehensive field reports and monitoring documentation maintained

amphibian_active.name: Amphibian Active
amphibian_active.description: Amphibian activity or breeding documented through field observations

bird_breeding.name: Bird Breeding
bird_breeding.description: Bird nesting or breeding activity recorded in garden

pollinator_hotspot.name: Pollinator Hotspot
pollinator_hotspot.description: High levels of pollinator activity observed and documented

corridor_node.name: Corridor Node
corridor_node.description: Functions as habitat connectivity node enabling wildlife movement

water_habitat.name: Water Habitat
water_habitat.description: Water features supporting aquatic or semi-aquatic wildlife

regeneration_success.name: Regeneration Success
regeneration_success.description: Evidence of natural regeneration and ecosystem recovery processes
